---
title: "Krimler"
subtitle: "Math · Computer Science · AI/ML · Security"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true        # generates index.xml (RSS) for discoverability
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
